summary: Comprehensive testing of Herion v7 - CatalogPage, WorkflowStepper, Personal Greeting. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Catalog page with 20 entries, filters (risk level, user type), search, expand/collapse; Practice Detail page with WorkflowStepper (6 steps) and User Identity Card; Dashboard with personal greeting 'Ciao, [name]'; Creator login with Control Room access; Admin login with dashboard redirect.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Root endpoint accessible
Backend: Creator login (gegexia94@gmail.com / HerionCreator2026!) works correctly
Backend: Creator login returns is_creator=true, creator_uuid=HERION-CREATOR-001, role=creator
Backend: Creator email blocked from public registration
Backend: Admin login (admin@aic.it / Admin123!) works correctly
Backend: Admin login returns role=admin
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/catalog returns 20 catalog entries
Backend: Catalog requires authentication
Backend: Catalog entries have valid risk levels (basic/medium)
Backend: Catalog entries have user_type arrays (private/freelancer/company)
Backend: GET /api/registry returns 14+ authority registry entries
Backend: Registry requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/practices returns list
Backend: Create and get practice works
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns stats
Backend: GET /api/agents/info returns agent information with Father Agent
Backend: Creator profile has is_creator and creator_uuid fields
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows personal greeting 'Ciao, Admin'
Frontend: Navigation bar has 'Catalogo' link
Frontend: Catalog page loads at /catalog
Frontend: Catalog page shows 20 entries
Frontend: Catalog search works - 'IVA' filters to 4 entries
Frontend: Catalog 'Base' risk filter works - shows 10 entries
Frontend: Catalog 'Medio' risk filter works - shows 10 entries
Frontend: Catalog 'Privato' user type filter works - shows 12 entries
Frontend: Catalog expand/collapse detail cards work
Frontend: Practice Detail page shows WorkflowStepper ('Stato della Pratica') with 6 steps
Frontend: WorkflowStepper shows steps: Dati Ricevuti, In Elaborazione, Approvazione, Approvata, Inviata, Completata
Frontend: Practice Detail page shows User/Client Identity Card with client name, type, country, fiscal code
Frontend: Creator login redirects to /creator (Control Room)
Frontend: Creator sees Control Room nav item
Frontend: Control Room shows CREATOR badge and HERION-CREATOR-001 UUID
Frontend: Creator dashboard shows personal greeting 'Ciao, Gege'
seed_data_creation: Practice Catalog (20 entries) and Authority Registry (14+ entries) seeded on startup. Creator account bootstrapped on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Herion v7 CatalogPage, WorkflowStepper, and Personal Greeting features are fully functional. Key features verified: 1) CatalogPage at /catalog with 20 entries, filters (Base/Medio risk, Privato/Freelancer/Azienda user type), search, expand/collapse 2) Practice Detail page with WorkflowStepper showing 6 lifecycle steps (Dati Ricevuti, In Elaborazione, Approvazione, Approvata, Inviata, Completata) 3) User/Client Identity Card on practice detail showing client name, type, country, fiscal code 4) Dashboard personal greeting 'Ciao, [name]' 5) Creator login redirects to /creator Control Room 6) Admin login redirects to /dashboard. All UI text is in Italian.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset email is MOCKED - reset link logged to backend console
mocked_apis.llm_calls: NOT MOCKED - All LLM calls use real Emergent LLM Key for GPT-5.2
